scripts.dev:local: sh -c 'npm run dev:api & API_PID=$!; npm run dev:web; kill $API_PID 2>/dev/null || true'
scripts.check: npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run build
scripts.test:contracts: tsx --test tests/test_llm_request_builder.ts tests/test_prompt_contracts.ts tests/test_visualization_html_generator.ts tests/test_rag_active_interaction_diagnostics.ts tests/test_rag_visualization_audit_pipeline.ts tests/test_rag_visualization_generate_route.ts tests/test_deep_interaction_design_review.ts tests/test_rag_visualization_layout.ts tests/test_api_v1_contracts.ts tests/test_route_compatibility.ts tests/test_static_route_contract.ts
scripts.check:core: npm run test:contracts && npm run typecheck && npm run lint
scripts.check:all: npm run check:core && npm run test:layout && npm run build
